plugins.name: mail
plugins.description: Mail handling with himalaya

plugins.name: steipete-scripts
plugins.description: Skills ported from steipete/agent-scripts. Attribution: Peter Steinberger (@steipete).

plugins.name: jd
plugins.description: Johnny Decimal filing system integration for Claude Code.

plugins.name: backlog
plugins.description: Backlog.md task tracker — manage markdown-based backlogs from Claude Code via MCP.

plugins.name: dayone
plugins.description: Day One journaling — create, read, and update journal entries via MCP.

plugins.name: things
plugins.description: Things.app task management — query tasks, projects, areas, and tags.

plugins.name: omnifocus
plugins.description: OmniFocus task management — create, update, complete, and query tasks and projects via MCP.

plugins.name: homebrew-audit
plugins.description: Audit and triage Homebrew packages via an org-mode workflow with babel action blocks.

plugins.name: claude-identity
plugins.description: Cross-session identity substrate: session handle resolution, scope/tag CRUD, match function. Foundation for claude-threads, jd-context, and other plugins that need to know which sessions are alive and what they're interested in.

plugins.name: claude-threads
plugins.description: Inter-session threaded conversations for Claude Code. Sessions exchange persistent multi-message threads filtered by subscription tags. Polls via SessionStart, UserPromptSubmit, and PostToolUse hooks (zero token cost when empty). Depends on claude-identity for handle resolution and the match function.

plugins.name: apple-music
plugins.description: Apple Music control and intelligent playlist curation.

plugins.name: apple-notes
plugins.description: Apple Notes integration — read, create, search, and triage notes via MCP.

plugins.name: apple-mail
plugins.description: Apple Mail — search, triage, archive, and draft replies from the command line.

plugins.name: claude-tone
plugins.description: Unique pentatonic notification tone per session. Plays on Stop and Notification events.

plugins.name: claude-goodbye
plugins.description: Agent self-termination with configurable /teardown sequence + /goodbye (SIGTERM to own PID). Depends on claude-identity.

plugins.name: tomatobar
plugins.description: Control TomatoBar Pomodoro timer and query session state from Claude Code.

plugins.name: marked-preview
plugins.description: Generate markdown and preview in Marked 2. Rich formatted output outside the terminal.

plugins.name: safari
plugins.description: Safari bookmarks and reading list — search, export, and manage.

plugins.name: pim
plugins.description: Personal information management — unified graph across notes, tasks, calendar, email, contacts, and more.

plugins.name: claude-notebook
plugins.description: Agent notebook for the JD vault. `/notebook` saves each session as a per-session note in `03.13 Agent notebook/YYYY-MM/`; `/notebook-rollup` generates weekly narrative rollups (`rollups/Agent rollup for YYYY-WNN.md`) for completed weeks.

plugins.name: calibre
plugins.description: Calibre ebook library curation — calibredb / ebook-meta / fetch-ebook-metadata / ebook-convert / calibre-server CLI knowledge skill plus slash commands for audit, backup, fix-metadata (OPF round-trip with ISBN sanity check), dedup, and bulk ingest. Captures 20 footguns including the wrong-ISBN-returns-confident-wrong-book trap and the corrupt-PDF embed crash.

plugins.name: zotero
plugins.description: Zotero research library knowledge skill — zotero-cli / zotero-mcp (zotero-mcp-server). Captures local/web/hybrid library-access modes, the SQLite GUI-lock problem, the `zotero-cli config` secrets-exposure footgun (prints OPENAI_API_KEY/ZOTERO_API_KEY verbatim), and canonical workflows for search, DOI ingestion, annotation extraction, and BibTeX export.

plugins.name: imessage-research
plugins.description: Search and curate iMessage history — decodes attributedBody typedstream blobs, resolves handles via multi-source AddressBook, expands hits into conversation clusters. Companion to the imessage plugin.
